description_long: This is a round, shallow ceramic plate with a delicate light blue and white floral pattern along the rim. The plate is topped with two pieces of golden-brown fried chicken and a small portion of thinly sliced green vegetables, likely lettuce or cabbage, arranged to one side. The fried chicken pieces are textured and appear crispy, with a slightly irregular shape. The plate's surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the food items are visually distinct from the plate itself. The plate appears to be of standard dinner size, suitable for serving a single meal. No visible cracks, chips, or significant wear are present, and the plate looks clean and well-maintained.
description: A round, light blue and white ceramic plate with floral patterns, holding two pieces of fried chicken and sliced green vegetables.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the plate and the layered arrangement of fried chicken and vegetables.
description_view_1: Top-down view clearly displaying the plate's floral pattern, two pieces of fried chicken, and sliced green vegetables.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the plate's edge and the profile of the food items.
description_view_3: Angled top view emphasizing the arrangement of the fried chicken and vegetables on the patterned plate.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: decorative floral patterns visible on the rim
